title: ReserveSELinuxLabels(): handle wrapped errors from OpenBuilder()
body:
`ReserveSELinuxLabels()` checks if an error returned by `OpenBuilder()` is a does-not-exist error, but `OpenBuilder()` returns wrapped errors now, and it wasn't checking the root cause error.

When `newBuilder()` fails, check the right error value when deciding whether or not deleting the partially-constructed container failed.

`OpenBuildersByPath()` shouldn't choke on non-buildah containers, so have it handle does-not-exist errors the same way `OpenAllBuilders()` does.

comments.body: LGTM - solves a nasty Buildah/Podman interaction bug we've been seeing in our CI
